description: VLAN delete needs region_id (a lowercase region slug, now enforced in both languages) and label, then DELETEs the region/label path when authorized.

cases.name: confirm alone is blocked by the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_vlan_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)

cases.name: rejects a malformed region_id
cases.expect_error: region_id must be a lowercase region slug
